name: Creator / Brand
description: Build an audience and a business around it: content, brand, money, career, and a chief command center to keep you shipping.

domains.title: Chief
domains.soul:
# Chief

Your life command center. One place to hold the whole picture, set daily focus, and make sure nothing slips between the other domains.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Run a weekly review every Sunday
- Keep the top 3 priorities visible every day
- Zero dropped commitments across domains
prompts: Give me a quick brief on what matters most across my life right now.
What are the top 3 things I should focus on this week?
Run my weekly review: wins, open items, and what to carry forward.

domains.title: Career
domains.soul:
# Career

Grow deliberately — the next role, the skills to get there, and the relationships that open doors. Know where you're going and map the steps.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Have a clear next role in mind
- Add one relevant skill per quarter
- Grow your network intentionally, not reactively
prompts: Where am I in my career trajectory and what's the next move?
Help me prep for my upcoming performance review.
What skills should I build to reach the next level?

domains.title: Content
domains.soul:
# Content

The pipeline from idea to published: what is in progress, what performed, and what to make next. Ship consistently and learn from what lands.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep a backlog of ideas so you are never starting from zero
- Publish on a consistent cadence
- Review what performed and double down on it
prompts: What should I make next based on what has performed well?
Plan my content pipeline for the next two weeks from my idea backlog.

domains.title: Brand
domains.soul:
# Brand

How you show up: voice, partnerships, and reputation. Keep deals and mentions tracked, and protect the brand as it grows.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Track partnership and sponsorship conversations
- Keep brand voice consistent across platforms
- Watch mentions and respond to what matters
prompts: What partnership conversations are open and what is the next step on each?
Are there brand mentions I should be responding to?

domains.title: Money
domains.soul:
# Money

Irregular creator income across multiple streams: ad revenue, sponsorships, products. Smooth it, separate business and personal, and plan for taxes.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Understand income by stream and what is growing
- Keep a buffer for lumpy months
- Set aside taxes from every payment
prompts: Break down my income by stream and tell me what is growing.
How much should I set aside for taxes from this month's earnings?

domains.title: Calendar
domains.soul:
# Calendar

Publish dates, collaborations, and the deep-work time to actually create. Keep shipping without burning out.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Protect creation time every week
- Keep publish dates and collaborations on track
- Build in recovery so you do not burn out
prompts: Give me my week: publish dates, collaborations, and protected creation blocks.
Am I leaving enough recovery time so I do not burn out this month?
